prestazioni: VK56VD (5.6L V8) engine: Full forged internals kit from JE Pistons (9.0:1 compression, 95mm bore) paired with Manley I-beam connecting rods and a billet crankshaft from Callies Compstar for 8,000 RPM reliability. Upgraded valvetrain with Ferrea Competition Series intake/exhaust valves, Iskenderian solid roller camshafts (280°/288° duration, 0.600" lift), and PAC Racing valve springs with titanium retainers.

Forced induction: Twin-turbo setup using Garrett GTX4202R Gen II turbos (62mm compressor, 76mm turbine) with TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates and custom 3.5" stainless steel intercooler piping from Vibrant Performance. AEM 380LPH high-flow fuel pump with ID1000x injectors and a Radium Engineering dual fuel pressure regulator ensures E85 compatibility.

Drivetrain & handling: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (4.625 final drive ratio) with a Tilton twin-disc carbon clutch and a QA1 2-way adjustable coilover suspension system (22-way rebound, 18-way compression damping) paired with Cusco front/rear sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear). Brembo GT 6-piston front (380mm rotors) and 4-piston rear (355mm rotors) brake kit with Ferodo DS2500 pads.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS QX70 widebody kit with custom carbon fiber fenders (3.5" flares), front/rear bumpers, and a vented hood with a 3D-printed Infiniti emblem. Rear diffuser from Seibon Carbon with integrated dual 4" exhaust outlets (custom titanium tips by Burns Stainless).

OEM+ interior overhaul: Recaro SP-G bucket seats (red Alcantara with black leather bolsters) wrapped in Takata 4-point harnesses, NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub, and a custom center console delete with a Motec C127 dash display. Full sound deadening with Dynamat Extreme and a custom 12" subwoofer enclosure from Audiofrog.

Aero & lighting: Vorsteiner carbon fiber roof panel with a custom roof spoiler from Rocket Bunny (Pandem). Front lip splitter from Varis with integrated LED DRLs (Lux H8 V4) and a custom rear wing from 996 Racing (3D-printed airfoil, 1,200mm span). Side mirrors replaced with carbon fiber units from Seibon with integrated turn signals.
